clupp.description: I contribute to a SaaS platform in the insurance domain, delivering product features with strong focus on performance, scalability and user experience.
responsibilities: Designed and implemented frontend and backend modules for quoting and internal operations.
Integrated APIs and services to support business-critical real-time workflows.
Improved architecture incrementally with emphasis on code quality, observability and long-term maintainability.
Collaborated with product and business stakeholders to turn operational requirements into technical deliverables.
achievements: Contributed to key platform and quote-engine iterations, improving stability and delivery cadence.
Standardized implementation patterns that reduced rework and improved team collaboration.

diferente-web.description: I led technical implementation of e-commerce solutions and custom integrations to improve commercial operations and system interoperability.
responsibilities: Designed and maintained APIs connecting internal platforms with third-party services.
Implemented BigCommerce integrations tailored to specific business rules.
Managed MySQL and MongoDB data models with attention to consistency, security and performance.
Contributed across the full development lifecycle, from technical discovery to deployment.
achievements: Delivered e-commerce integrations that reduced manual effort in critical operations.
Improved interoperability between applications by defining clearer and more maintainable API contracts.

hoteles-buenaventura.description: Built a booking solution with an interactive calendar to improve availability management and booking experience for end users.
responsibilities: Implemented an interactive calendar focused on date selection and real-time availability.
Built REST APIs with Laravel and MySQL to centralize reservation logic.
Developed React.js interfaces to streamline the booking flow.
Integrated frontend and backend to ensure consistent behavior and traceable operational data.
achievements: Delivered a clearer booking flow that reduced friction during date selection.
Consolidated operational rules into reusable APIs for future iterations.

the-rocket-code.description: Worked on client-facing web products, strengthening frontend and backend architecture to improve maintainability and delivery speed.
responsibilities: Developed product features with React.js for business-oriented applications.
Migrated a quote tool from Next.js to React.js to simplify support and code evolution.
Designed and implemented APIs with Node.js, Express and MongoDB for operational use cases.
Partnered with multidisciplinary teams to deliver value in short release cycles.
achievements: Reduced technical complexity in a key module after frontend stack migration.
Introduced structural improvements that made deployment and ongoing maintenance more predictable.

creativa-softline.description: Started my professional path building corporate websites focused on usability, responsive layout and visual consistency.
responsibilities: Designed and developed responsive web interfaces for clients across different sectors.
Implemented layouts using Bootstrap and CSS frameworks optimized for delivery speed.
Contributed across the full workflow: visual proposal, layout implementation and production release.
achievements: Built strong frontend foundations in semantic HTML and maintainable layout practices.
Delivered functional websites under tight timelines while preserving visual and technical quality.
